feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1888 201 1687 81
TR 1739 172 1567 66

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Knight & Dragon IV
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Rare drops! Class changes! And an epic story. The 4th installment of the hardcore Hack & Slash RPG "Knight & Dragon," packed with replay value! "Knight & Dragon 4" is the fourth title in this Hack & Slash RPG series built within a medieval fantasy world. The story takes place about 30 years prior to the events of the previous game, III. The setting is the "Hundred Years' War" between the great Lindar Empire and the Kingdom of Langheim, one of the Eldorua kingdoms. The journey begins in a refugee camp located near the border of these two great powers. In a world swirling with conspiracy, people from all walks of life are swept up in the chaos of war. The stories of their respective knights and dragons eventually converge toward a single conclusion. Enjoy an epic narrative featuring characters from previous titles. [Features of Knight & Dragon 4] * Heated Real-Time Battles: The core systems of a "replayable RPG," such as rare item drops and class changes, follow the beloved formula of previous titles! * Expanded Party Size: You can now battle with a party of 6 members. Time pauses while selecting commands, allowing for more intuitive control! * Deep Strategic Gameplay: With new systems like "Formations" and "Skill Chaining," the battle system is more refined, offering even more depth and replayability! * New Jobs Added: With the addition of the "Beast Tamer" and "Gladiator," there are now 8 jobs in total. New skills have also been added to complement existing jobs! * Revamped World: A completely renewed world map to color the epic story. Of course, post-game content is included! * Legacy Content: Many characters from the previous game appear, with significant text additions that supplement the scenarios of the past titles! * Classic Features: Popular basic functions from the previous game, such as Party Dispatch, Persona functions, and Equipment Enhancement/Customization, are all here! ... If you would like to experience the atmosphere of the game before purchasing, the previous title "Knight & Dragon" is available completely free of charge, so please give it a try. Official Website http://dgjam.com/knightdragon4

entry.title: Knight & Dragon III
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺29,99 [₺29,99 ~ ₺179,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺29,99

Application Description

Rare Items! Class Change! And an epic story. The third installment of the full-fledged hack-and-slash RPG "Knight and Dragon," packed with replayability! "Knight and Dragon 3" is the third installment in the hack-and-slash RPG series set in a medieval fantasy world. One morning, after receiving a certificate from an elderly gentleman, proving you as a full-fledged guild member, you are sent to a small village in the Republic of Gringard. This is where the story begins. Various incidents occurring in the Republic, the conflicts with the neighboring Lindahl Empire, and the story of knights and dragons will eventually involve you in a grand destiny revolving around the stars. [Features of Knight and Dragon 3] ▽ The basic systems of a replayable RPG such as intense real-time battles, rare item drops, and class changes are inherited from the previous game! ▽ Real-time battles are now more interactive, allowing you to dodge, parry, and counter by reading the enemy’s attack timings! ▽ A variety of weapons like axes, spears, and halberds appear among the items! Additionally, you can create characters to your liking, including dual-wielding and two-handed weapons! ▽ A world map that enhances the epic story is introduced! The story, with even more volume than the previous game, and the end content are still going strong! ▽ Moreover, in this game, a diverse range of NPCs with unique characteristics, place names, city names, and other proper nouns depict the grand story! ▽ Other features such as party dispatch and the Persona function, which were well received in the previous game, are of course continued! ・・・ For those who want to get a feel for the game before purchasing, the previous game "Knight and Dragon" is completely free to enjoy, so please give it a try. Official Homepage http://dgjam.com/knightdragon3

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Art of Rally
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺399,99]）

In-App Purchases

  • art of rally: australia dlc：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺99,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

In-App Purchases

  • art of rally: australia dlc：₺49,99

Application Description

Race across the world through colorful and stylized environments in top-down view. Compete for first place in the leaderboards with daily and weekly challenges. Will you master the art of rally? Experience the golden era of rally in Career mode, traveling across 78 stages from Finland to Sardinia, Norway, Japan, Germany, Kenya and Indonesia. Get behind the wheel of your favorite vintage cars, ranging from the 60’s to the 80’s, Group B, Group S and Group A. From beginner-friendly options to driving modes that’ll challenge the most expert drivers, all players can tackle the races using their favorite rally driving tricks: Scandinavian flick, counter steering, left foot braking, handbrake turns. Get your name out at the top of the Leaderboard in our daily and weekly challenges. Show off your driving skills, or simply your favourite landscapes, with the integrated Photo and Replay mode.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Neo Monsters
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 13 Gems：₺399,99
  • 1 Gem：₺49,99
  • 6 Gems：₺199,99
  • 48 Gems：₺1.499,99
  • 74 Gems：₺2.299,99
  • 150 Gems：₺3.999,99
  • 28 Gems：₺799,99

Application Description

Become a Legend! Capture over 2000 Animated Monsters and Duel in Real-Time PvP! Form your team and battle for victory! Capture, train, and evolve to become the champion in one of the biggest monster battling RPGs! Neo Monsters is an addictive strategy RPG that features epic 4v4 battles between two teams of up to 16 monsters. The unique turn-based battle system allows you to come up with powerful chain strategies by combining hundreds of abilities. Hunt down the strongest monsters and harness their power, then take the battle online to dominate in exciting PvP battles and leagues! Are you ready to take the challenge? ▶Features: ● Build your Monster Collection • Capture and evolve over 1000 fully animated monsters! • Train your monsters and unleash their deadly potential. • Collect evolution ingredients to create the ultimate power! ● Form a Battle Strategy • Build the ultimate team of up to 16 monsters. • Defeat your opponents in epic turn-based 4v4 battles! • Create devastating combinations from hundreds of abilities. ● Become the Champion • Conquer six Leagues and take on the Grand Champion in 60+ hours of adventure! • Explore multiple islands and dungeons on your journey. • Follow the story to uncover the truth behind your late uncle’s atrocity. ● Take the Battle Online • Duel players from around the world in PvP leagues! • Complete 100+ online missions. • Take on weekly updated events to unlock big rewards. Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NeoMonstersOfficial/ Join the Neo Monsters community: http://www.neomonstersforum.com/ Issues or questions? Contact our support: neomonsupport.gameplay@zigzagame.net Terms of Service: https://www.zigzagame.com/terms/ Privacy Policy: https://www.zigzagame.com/privacy-policy/

entry.title: Cello Tuner Professional
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：₺199,99
  • Settings：₺199,99

Application Description

Tune your cello instantly with precision and ease! Optimal for beginners, intermediate and advanced musicians! · The most accurate - displays the exact sound frequency in Hz. · Calibration for A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Instant load and fastest tuning! - Optimized for latest devices. · Highest responsiveness and sensitivity. · Intuitive user interface with LED tuning indicator. · Visual indicators - tuned string lights up. · Universal app - works with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch. · Advanced settings (A4 calibration, Mic sensitivity, Sound notifications) and Tuning fork! (as in-app purchases) What our users say: "Does what it promises - Very useful app." "This app makes tuning so easy!" "By far the greatest and most accurate cello tuning app. Play the string, read its chart and you know whether you're in tune." "Amazing! Outstanding, well spent money! "All cellists should have this app!" "It's very useful for me! Thank you!" "Excellent app" "Very convenient software. Suitable for any skill!" --- Please make sure to allow microphone access to this app when prompted. Check it under Settings>Privacy>Microphone. Thank you. --- Got ideas? Questions? Please send us your feedback through our site or to feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Card.Note - 多彩卡片笔记
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺4,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺19,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Card.Note Premiun：₺99,99

Application Description

Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ； 你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。 你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒； 还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。 「Card.Note」九大特点： 1.极简设计 循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。 2.文青定制 精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。 3.全局卡片化 充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。 4.全局手势化 下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。 5.语音录入 打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。 6.要事提醒： 可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。 7.快捷高效 支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。 8.iCloud云同步 支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。 9.深色模式 全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。 感谢下载，生活愉快。 如有问题或建议，请联系开发者 微博：土味文艺开发者 邮箱：yande18@126.com

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: 伤寒论条阅
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺4,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

- 按条文编号查找 - 按条文内容查找 - 按方剂名称查找 - 按方剂组成查找 - 收藏重点条目和方剂 - 笔记功能 - 复制条文 - 简体 繁体切换 本App仅供中医爱好者和从业者学习参考使用，具体使用谨遵明医。 内容校订需要精力和时间，如有遗漏欢迎留言评论。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Premium Lifetime：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺1.499,99]
  • Yearly Subscription：₺399,99 → ₺299,99 [₺299,99 ~ ₺1.299,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Premium Lifetime：₺399,99
  • Pro – Lifetime：₺0,00
  • Weekly Subscription：₺49,99
  • Yearly Subscription：₺299,99

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration. Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/auto-redial-app-rellamadas/pol%C3%ADtica-de-privacidad?pli=1 Terms of Use (EULA): Apple App Store https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: AeroPads - Pads & Soundscapes
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺399,99 → ₺299,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺449,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺299,99

In-App Purchases

  • Rocket Science Pack：₺249,99
  • Orbit Pack：₺249,99

Application Description

Have you ever struggled to find confidence on stage or inspiration in the studio? AeroPads cues immersive pads and soundscapes that inspire and equip you to perform and write your best. ENHANCE YOUR SOUND. ENGAGE YOUR AUDIENCE. Every musician has experienced an empty mix or an awkward transition. When using AeroPads, you instantly add more dimension and character to your sound. With a more immersive mix and the ability to perform smooth and seamless transitions, you will feel more confident while your audience will be more engaged. FOR EVERY MUSICIAN. Pads and soundscapes are a versatile accompaniment to nearly any style of music. Whether you are a soloist or full band, AeroPads will take your sound to the next level. Rock bands, worship teams, wedding singers, producers, songwriters, and instrumentalists are just a few of the many types of musicians that have loved using AeroPads. DESIGNED FOR THE STAGE. INSPIRED BY SPACE. AeroPads features creative and immersive soundscapes paired with a beautiful and intuitive interface, all inspired by the pinnacle of exploration and inspiration: outer space. CREATIVITY THAT SPARKS CREATIVITY. AeroPads aren't your typical pads. Most pads out there are really boring or insanely obnoxious. However, AeroPads features thoughtfully crafted soundscapes that are meticulously fine-tuned with the perfect amount of harmonic and textural movement. Simply put, AeroPads won't step on the toes of your arrangement or get on the nerves of your sound guy (like most other pads out there). Highlighted Features: - A beautiful space-inspired interface with a simple and intuitive design. - Live View: Every key and three of your favorite patches are instantly accessible (best suited for experimentation, free-flowing sets, and songwriting). - Setlist View: Plan and build a detailed setlist (best suited for structured sets and seamless transitions). - The iconic Atmosphere Soundpack which includes five unique patches named after and inspired by the layers of Earth's atmosphere. - Three patches can be added to Live View to be made instantly accessible, so there's no need to dig through menus to just to change a patch when performing live. - Additional patches and Soundpacks available for purchase. - Key-specific pads in multiple tonalities: major, minor, and neutral. - Concert pitch adjustment. How to Use: 01. Cue a pad that matches the key of your musical arrangement. 02. Play overtop of the accompanying pads and soundcapes. 03. Enjoy the boost of audience engagement, musician confidence, and creative inspiration. Pads and soundscapes are intended as a subtle accompaniment to musical arrangements/performances. They are designed to be cued according to the key of the arrangement. Once cued, you'll hear a droning pad centered around the root note with additional harmonic textures within the selected key. The only time a pad's key should change within a song is in the instance of a key change. For best results, mix AeroPads appropriately within the overall mix. When mixed too loud, AeroPads may compete with melodies and the arrangement. When mixed too quietly, AeroPads may be less effective. When mixed appropriately, they will sound awesome.
